name: Convert meters to feet with positive integer input
description: User selects 'Length' category, chooses 'Meters' as source unit and 'Feet' as target unit, enters '10', and views the converted result.
objective: Verify correct conversion from meters to feet with standard precision.
expected_result: Displays '32.8084 ft' (rounded to 4 decimal places).

name: Convert Celsius to Fahrenheit with negative decimal input
description: User navigates to temperature category, selects 'Celsius' → 'Fahrenheit', enters '-40.5', and checks the result.
objective: Validate accurate conversion of negative decimal temperature values.
expected_result: Displays '-40.9 °F' (rounded to 1 decimal place).

name: Convert kilograms to pounds with zero input
description: User selects 'Weight' category, sets 'Kilograms' → 'Pounds', and inputs '0'.
objective: Confirm correct handling and display of zero-value conversion.
expected_result: Displays '0.0000 lb' (formatted to 4 decimal places).

name: Convert miles to kilometers with large number input
description: User chooses 'Length', selects 'Miles' → 'Kilometers', and enters '999999'.
objective: Ensure numeric overflow or precision limits are handled gracefully without crash or scientific notation.
expected_result: Displays '1,609,343.999 km' (formatted with comma separators and 3 decimal places).

name: Attempt conversion with invalid non-numeric input
description: User selects 'Length', 'Inches' → 'Centimeters', and types 'abc' into the input field.
objective: Verify system prevents erroneous conversion and provides clear user feedback.
expected_result: Displays error message such as 'Please enter a valid number' and highlights input field.

name: Convert grams to ounces with very small decimal
description: User selects 'Weight', 'Grams' → 'Ounces', and enters '0.001'.
objective: Test precision retention for sub-gram conversions.
expected_result: Displays '0.00004 oz' (scientific notation avoided; shown as decimal with trailing zeros up to 5 places).

name: Switch target unit mid-session and re-calculate
description: User converts '25' from 'Celsius' to 'Kelvin', then changes target unit to 'Fahrenheit' without re-entering value.
objective: Confirm real-time recalculation upon target unit change.
extra_info: source_unit: Celsius, initial_target: Kelvin, new_target: Fahrenheit, input_value: 25
expected_result: Result updates instantly from '298.15 K' to '77.0 °F'.

name: Empty input conversion attempt
description: User selects 'Length', 'Kilometers' → 'Miles', but leaves input field blank and triggers conversion.
objective: Validate graceful handling of empty input before conversion.
expected_result: Displays placeholder or prompt like 'Enter a value' and does not show numeric result.

name: Enable a previously hidden unit in Length category
description: User navigates to the Length category settings, locates the disabled 'furlong' unit, and toggles it back on.
objective: Verify that a hidden unit can be re-enabled and appears in the unit selection menu for Length conversions.
extra_info: Category: Length; Unit: furlong; State before: disabled
expected_result: The 'furlong' unit is visible and selectable in the Length unit picker after saving preferences.

name: Disable a unit in Temperature category and confirm removal from conversion UI
description: User opens Temperature category settings, disables 'Rankine', saves changes, then starts a new temperature conversion.
objective: Ensure disabled units do not appear in the unit selection dropdowns during active conversion.
extra_info: Category: Temperature; Unit: Rankine; State before: enabled
expected_result: Rankine is absent from both source and target unit lists in the conversion interface.

name: Persist unit visibility settings across app restart
description: User disables 'carat' under Mass, exits the app completely, relaunches, and checks Mass unit list.
objective: Validate that unit visibility configuration survives app termination and restart.
extra_info: Category: Mass; Unit: carat; State before: enabled
expected_result: Carat does not appear in the Mass unit selection menu after relaunch.

name: Disable all units in a category and verify empty unit list
description: User disables every unit under Area (e.g., acre, hectare, square mile), saves, then opens Area conversion.
objective: Confirm behavior when no units are enabled in a category — e.g., placeholder or empty state handling.
extra_info: Category: Area; Units disabled: acre, hectare, square mile, square yard, square foot, square inch, km², m², cm², mm²
expected_result: Area unit selection shows either an empty list with appropriate message (e.g., 'No units enabled') or defaults to a fallback behavior without crashing.

name: Toggle visibility of multiple units across different categories simultaneously
description: User disables 'nautical mile' (Length), enables 'BTU' (Energy), and disables 'bar' (Pressure) in one settings session, then saves.
objective: Test multi-category unit visibility changes applied atomically and correctly persisted.
extra_info: Categories: Length, Energy, Pressure; Units: nautical mile (disable), BTU (enable), bar (disable)
expected_result: Nautical mile is hidden in Length, BTU is visible in Energy, and bar is hidden in Pressure — all reflected immediately in respective conversion screens.

name: Re-enable a unit after clearing app data and reopening
description: User clears app data, launches app, configures unit preferences, disables 'peck' under Volume, then re-enables it later.
objective: Verify that unit visibility state is properly initialized and modifiable post-reset.
extra_info: Category: Volume; Unit: peck; App state: fresh install / data cleared
expected_result: After re-enabling 'peck', it appears in the Volume unit list during conversion.

name: Select and reorder properties to display on main interface
description: User accesses display settings, enables 'Conversion History' and 'Favorite Units', disables 'Recent Categories', and drags 'Favorite Units' above 'Conversion History'.
objective: Verify that selected properties appear in the specified order on the main screen after saving changes.
expected_result: Main interface shows only 'Favorite Units' followed by 'Conversion History'; 'Recent Categories' is absent.

name: Disable all properties and confirm empty main interface
description: User navigates to display settings and turns off visibility for all available properties (e.g., Conversion History, Favorite Units, Recent Categories).
objective: Confirm that the main interface displays no property sections when all are disabled.
expected_result: Main screen shows only app header and empty space — no property cards or sections visible.

name: Reorder properties using drag-and-drop and verify persistence
description: User enables 'Recent Categories', 'Conversion History', and 'Favorite Units', then reorders them as: 'Recent Categories' → 'Favorite Units' → 'Conversion History'.
objective: Ensure the new order persists across app restarts and is reflected immediately upon returning to main screen.
expected_result: After closing and reopening the app, main screen displays sections in the exact reordered sequence.

name: Enable single property and verify isolated display
description: User disables all properties except 'Recent Categories' in display settings.
objective: Validate that only the enabled property appears, correctly formatted and functional, with no residual UI elements from disabled ones.
expected_result: Main interface shows only one section titled 'Recent Categories' containing at least three example category names (e.g., 'Length', 'Weight', 'Temperature').

name: Toggle property visibility mid-session and observe immediate UI update
description: While on the main screen, user opens display settings, unchecks 'Conversion History', saves, and returns to main screen without restarting the app.
objective: Confirm real-time removal of the 'Conversion History' section without requiring app reload.
expected_result: The 'Conversion History' section disappears instantly upon returning to main screen; other enabled sections remain unchanged.

name: Enter valid positive decimal number
description: User enters a legitimate positive decimal value (e.g., '123.45') into the numeric conversion input field.
objective: Verify that valid decimal numbers are accepted and processed without error.
expected_result: Input is accepted; conversion proceeds normally; no error message appears.

name: Enter valid negative integer
description: User enters a negative whole number (e.g., '-789') into the numeric conversion field.
objective: Ensure negative integers are accepted as valid numeric input.
expected_result: Input is accepted; conversion proceeds normally; no error message appears.

name: Enter invalid alphabetic characters
description: User types letters (e.g., 'abc') into the numeric conversion field.
objective: Confirm non-numeric characters (excluding '.' and '-') trigger inline validation and prevent submission.
expected_result: Inline error message appears (e.g., 'Please enter a valid number'); conversion is disabled or ignored until corrected.

name: Enter mixed invalid symbols
description: User enters symbols like '@#$', '12a3!', or '5.6.7' into the numeric field.
objective: Validate that multiple or repeated invalid characters (including double decimal points) are rejected.
expected_result: Inline error message appears; input is not processed; cursor remains active for correction.

name: Submit empty input
description: User taps convert button without entering any characters in the numeric field.
objective: Verify behavior when field is completely empty.
expected_result: Inline error message appears (e.g., 'Value cannot be empty'); conversion is not triggered.

name: Submit whitespace-only input
description: User enters only spaces, tabs, or newlines (e.g., '   ') and attempts conversion.
objective: Ensure leading/trailing/only whitespace is treated as invalid and handled gracefully.
expected_result: Inline error message appears; input is trimmed and found empty; conversion is blocked.

name: Enter single decimal point
description: User types only '.' into the numeric field.
objective: Test edge case where decimal point lacks associated digits.
expected_result: Inline error message appears (e.g., 'Invalid number format'); conversion is disabled.

name: Enter standalone minus sign
description: User types only '-' into the numeric field.
objective: Validate handling of isolated unary minus without numeric follow-up.
expected_result: Inline error message appears; input is rejected as incomplete.

name: Enter number with trailing decimal (e.g., '42.')
description: User enters a whole number followed by a decimal point but no fractional digits.
objective: Determine if trailing decimal is accepted (per common UX conventions) or flagged.
expected_result: Input is accepted (treated as '42.0'); no error message appears; conversion proceeds.

name: Paste invalid clipboard content
description: User pastes non-numeric text (e.g., 'N/A', '—', or '∞') into the numeric field.
objective: Ensure paste operation respects input validation rules same as keyboard entry.
expected_result: Inline error message appears; pasted content is either rejected or auto-cleared on blur/focus loss.

name: Settings retained after app restart
description: Verifies that all user-configured settings (unit visibility, display order, currency) remain unchanged after closing and reopening the app.
objective: Confirm persistence of settings across app lifecycle restarts.
extra_info: Unit visibility: Temperature, Length; Display order: Amount, Currency, Unit; Currency preference: USD
expected_result: All previously saved settings (e.g., 'Temperature' and 'Length' units visible, 'USD' selected as default currency, custom display order 'Amount → Currency → Unit') are restored exactly as configured.

name: Currency preference persists after device reboot
description: Checks whether the selected default currency remains saved after a full device restart.
objective: Validate settings survive OS-level restart, not just app process termination.
expected_result: The user's chosen currency (e.g., EUR) is still active as the default in the converter interface upon first launch post-reboot.

name: Hidden units remain hidden after session restore
description: Ensures units explicitly disabled by the user (e.g., 'Pressure', 'Data') stay hidden across app sessions.
objective: Confirm unit visibility toggles are persisted correctly.
expected_result: Units marked as 'hidden' before app exit do not appear in the unit selection list or conversion options after relaunch.

name: Custom display order preserved after update
description: Validates that user-defined display property ordering (e.g., 'Unit → Amount → Currency') survives an app update and subsequent launch.
objective: Ensure settings persistence is resilient to version upgrades.
expected_result: The display sequence matches the user’s last configuration, with no reversion to default order.

name: Settings intact after force stop and relaunch
description: Tests persistence when the app is force-stopped via system settings and then reopened.
objective: Verify robustness against abrupt process termination.
extra_info: Enabled units: Length, Mass, Time; Default currency: JPY; Display order: Currency, Amount
expected_result: All settings—including enabled units, currency, and display order—match pre-force-stop configuration.

name: Empty or reset settings not applied on first launch
description: Confirms that no default or fallback values override user settings—even if internal storage is initially empty or corrupted.
objective: Ensure settings are only loaded from persistent user store, not regenerated.
expected_result: App displays 'No settings found' warning or prompts for initial setup instead of silently applying defaults, preserving integrity of user intent.
